item.title: Version VERSION_NUMBER
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool VERSION_NUMBER

  • 🛠️ FIXED: Apple Quick Look now stays selected in regular and "Fill"/maximized windows — fullscreen detection no longer falsely matches non-fullscreen full-size windows and only falls back to the Custom Preview when the focused app is in a true "Entire Screen" Space
  • ⌨️ IMPROVED: Arrow navigation while Apple Quick Look is open — the search field keeps focus and ↑/↓ now reliably moves the highlight in Quick Picker, reloading the QL preview with the new item even when QL grabs key window status

item.title: Version 1.5.3
item.description:
Version 1.5.3

See release notes on GitHub for details.

item.title: Version VERSION_NUMBER
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool VERSION_NUMBER

  • 🪟 NEW: Quick Picker now renders over other apps' fullscreen Spaces — open it without leaving the app you're in
  • 🖼️ NEW: Menu bar popover now appears alongside other apps' fullscreen apps too
  • 🔍 NEW: Smart preview fallback — when you trigger preview while in another app's fullscreen Space, the custom preview is used automatically (Apple Quick Look is system-managed and can't render in another app's fullscreen)
  • ⌨️ IMPROVED: Search field cursor now lands in the Quick Picker on open and is restored after closing the preview
  • 🛠️ FIXED: Quick Picker no longer pulls you out of another app's fullscreen Space when triggered
  • 🛠️ FIXED: QuickLook stability — temp files are cleaned up with a delay so "Open with…" actions have time to read them
  • 🛠️ IMPROVED: Window resignation handling — Quick Picker now closes cleanly when an external app activates (e.g. via "Open with…")
  • 🧹 IMPROVED: Code quality refactor based on SonarCloud scanner issues

item.title: Version 1.5.2
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool 1.5.2

  • 🛡️ NEW: Accessibility settings tab — view permission status and open System Settings directly
  • 🚀 NEW: Launch at Login toggle using SMAppService with first-launch prompt
  • 🎨 NEW: Dynamic tab icon reflects accessibility permission status
  • 🎨 IMPROVED: Quick Picker item row layout with footer bar and keyboard shortcut hints
  • 🧹 IMPROVED: Unified clipboard alerts into a shared component
  • 🛡️ IMPROVED: Stabilized deletion logic — items properly removed from UI and database
  • 🐛 FIXED: GUI layout issue (#5)
  • 🐛 FIXED: Deleted items still visible after deletion (#6)
  • 🐛 FIXED: Prevented crashes on delete operations

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
Version 1.4.0

See release notes on GitHub for details.

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool 1.4.0

  • 🛡️ Separated database storage for clipboard history and settings — corruption in one won't affect the other
  • 🛡️ Crash protection: automatic recovery from database corruption instead of crashes
  • 🛡️ All database operations now safely roll back on errors
  • 📝 New optional error logging setting for debugging
  • ✨ Native macOS Quick Look support: press Space or Arrow Right to preview clipboard items
  • ⚙️ Configurable trigger key and preview mode (Native, Custom, Disabled) in Settings
  • ⌨️ Smart spacebar handling: only previews when search is empty or ends with a space
  • ➡️ Smart arrow navigation: right arrow previews only at end of search text
  • ⚡️ Improved performance for large text previews
  • 👁️ Option+Enter on image in QuickPicker extracts text via OCR
  • ⚙️ New setting to toggle OCR feature
  • 🖱️ New context menu in QuickPicker: right-click to Open in Preview or TextEdit
  • ⚠️ Excluded apps and hotkey configurations will be reset due to database restructuring

item.title: Version 1.3.2
item.description:
Version 1.3.2

  • ✨ IMPROVED: Quick Picker now asks Accessibility for pasting simulation
  • ✨ IMPROVED: Quick Picker now isolates itself by hiding all other windows when launched
  • 🎯 IMPROVED: Quick Picker search field now automatically focuses for immediate typing

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description:
Version 1.3.1

  • ✨ IMPROVED: Quick Picker now isolates itself by hiding all other windows when launched
  • 🎯 IMPROVED: Quick Picker search field now automatically focuses for immediate typing
  • 🐛 Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool 1.3.0

  • 🔎 NEW: Advanced Search - Search through your clipboard history with a modern search bar featuring macOS 15+ liquid glass effect
  • 🚫 NEW: Excluded Apps - Choose which apps to exclude from clipboard monitoring in Settings for enhanced privacy
  • ⏸️ NEW: Pause Monitoring - Temporarily pause clipboard tracking with a customizable timer
  • ⭐ FIXED: Enhanced Favorites - Fixed loading of all favorites even when they're at the bottom of the list
  • 🎨 IMPROVED: Menu bar now displays pause timer with better visual feedback
  • 🐛 Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool 1.2.0

  • ⚡ NEW: @MainActor class AppDelegate - Better initialization on login for improved stability
  • 🎨 NEW: Updated Liquid Glass app icons - Native Icon Composer design with modern aesthetic
  • ⭐ FIXED: Favorites persistence - Favorite items are now protected from auto-deletion
  • 📋 NEW: Clipboard Capture Modes - Choose to capture only text, only images, or both (useful for Microsoft Word text-only paste)
  • 🔗 NEW: Combined clipboard items - Save text and image as a single item (BETA)
  • 🔍 NEW: OCR Text Recognition - Extract text from images using Apple Vision framework
  • 🐛 Bug fixes and performance improvements

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool 1.1.0

  • 🔥 NEW: Global Hotkeys System - System-wide keyboard shortcuts for instant clipboard access
  • ⚡️ NEW: Quick Picker Window - Spotlight-like floating panel (Ctrl+Option+Space)
  • 🎮 NEW: Direct Paste to Active Apps - Hotkeys automatically paste to current application
  • 🪟 NEW: Favorites - Save often-used items for quick access
  • 🎯 NEW: Quick Access Shortcuts - Ctrl+Option+1-0 for last items, Ctrl+Shift+1-0 for favorites
  • 🏷️ Enhanced UI - Visual type indicators and improved file previews
  • ⚙️ Extended Settings - Hotkey configuration and advanced preferences
  • 📊 Better Data Models - Enhanced clipboard item management with favorites support
  • 📊 Memory usage optimization

item.title: Version 1.0.7
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool 1.0.7

  • 1.0.7 testing updating
  • 🔧 Fixed update checking functionality in Settings
  • 📧 Enhanced feedback email with system information
  • ⚡ Improved Sparkle updater integration
  • 🐛 Bug fixes and stability improvements

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
StoneClipboarderTool 1.0.0

  • 🎉 Initial release of StoneClipboarderTool
  • 📊 Full clipboard history tracking with Swift Data
  • 🖥️ Menu bar integration for quick access
  • 🔄 Automatic updates using Sparkle framework
  • 🔒 Privacy-focused - all data stays on your device
  • ✨ Modern SwiftUI interface
